title: Front Office Manager - Sapphire Foods India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Sapphire Foods India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India:
Sapphire Foods India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
